name: Spirit Naga

traits.name: Fiendish Restoration
traits.text: If it dies, the naga returns to life in 1d6 days and regains all its Hit Points. Only a Wish spell can prevent this trait from functioning.

text:
# Spirit Naga

*Large Fiend, Chaotic Evil*

An undying serpent sorcerer that returns from death to nurse old grudges.

### Actions

**Bite.** Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 10 ft. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) Piercing damage plus 14 (4d6) Poison damage.

**Necrotic Ray.** Ranged Attack Roll: +6, range 60 ft. Hit: 21 (6d6) Necrotic damage.
